content:
# Final Review Votes
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Verified prompt-hg4.md at the repo root is byte-identical to .ralph-burning/projects/hg4-1/prompt.md, added in checkpoint commit 09137847, and not referenced anywhere in the codebase. Removing it is a clean cleanup of stray cruft unrelated to the is_timeout_related refactor.

## Votes

- `fr-1-732ae5c5`: Accept
  Confirmed via diff that /home/user/ralph-burning/prompt-hg4.md and .ralph-burning/projects/hg4-1/prompt.md are identical (same size 2676, diff empty). Grep for 'prompt-hg4' across the repo finds no references except a sibling final_review artifact. The file was committed in the 09137847 checkpoint alongside the is_timeout_related refactor but has no relation to that scope — it's an accidentally-committed duplicate of the project's own prompt.md. Removing it eliminates confusing root-level cruft without losing any information.
